titleStmt.title: SII 23.371: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 371. (A.R. No. 371 of 1907.) Māyūram, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Mayūranāthasvāmi temple—on the south wall of the first prākāra Rājarāja III: year 2[9]+1+1: 1245-46 A.D.

summary.p: This registers a gift of 2000 kāśu deposited with the Sthānattār of the temple of Tirumayilāḍutuṟai-Uḍaiyār in Tiruveḻundūr-nāḍu to meet the expenses of daily worship, bath, apparel and offerings to the image of the goddess Bhuvanāpati-Nāchchiyār consecrated (by the donor) in the tirunaḍai-māḷigai (circuit) of the temple by Ambalaṅkōyil-koṇḍāṉ Aṟṟapōdaikkudaviṉāṉ of Śambaṅguḍi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājatevarkku yāṇṭu Iru pattoṉpatāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu koṇṭa coḻa vaḷa nāṭṭut tiruveḻuntūr nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumayilāṭutuṟai Uṭaiyār koyil r tevarkaṉmi nāyaṉār koyil
ttirunaṭaimāḷikaiyil campaṅkuṭaiyāṉ Ampalaṅ koyil koṇṭāṉ Aṟṟapotaikkutaviṉāṉ Eḻuntaruḷa viṇṇappam ceyta puvaṉāpati nācciyārkku nittaṟpaṭi pūcaicella tirumañcaṉattiṟkum m tirupparicaṭṭat tiruamutu Arici Irunāḻikkum kaṟi
tuḷḷiṭṭa viccaṉaṅkaḷuñ śrī paṇṭārattuc cella nāṅkaḷ niccayittu mituṉa nāyiṟṟu muṉṟāntiyati nāḷ śrī paṇṭārattukku mutalāka Oṭukki vittuk koṇṭa kācu Iraṇṭāyiram Ikkācu Iraṇṭāyira [iṉṉāḷ mutal cantirātittaval]
Ippaṭi Upaiyamāka pūcai cellakkaṭavatāka kalveṭṭikkuṭuttom Ik koyil tāṉattom Itu śrīmākeśvararakṣai
Digital edition of SII 23.371 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
